transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I’d like to book an appointment, please.
I'd be happy to help you with that! What specific service do you need?
I need a maintenance check for my HVAC system.
Great, thanks for that! Can I have your full name, please?
Sure, it's Maria Santos.
Perfect, got it. And what is the best callback number for you, Maria?
My number is 555-321-6789.
Great, thanks for that. That's 555-321-6789, correct?
Yes, that’s correct.
Perfect! Now, could you please provide the service address?
It's 234 Lake Dr, Dallas, TX.
Thank you! Just to confirm, that's 234 Lake Dr, Dallas, TX. Does that sound right?
Yes, that's right.
Great! Lastly, is there an email address you'd like to provide for confirmation?
Yes, my email is maria@test.com.
Thanks! Just to confirm, the email is maria@test.com. Is that correct?

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, it's Mike Henderson again. I need some help with my HVAC system.
Hi Mike! I’m glad you called back. What specific issue are you experiencing with your HVAC system?
It’s not cooling properly. The air feels warm.
I understand, that sounds frustrating. Let me get some details to help you out. Can I have your full name, please?
It's Mike Henderson.
Great, thanks for that, Mike. What is the best callback number for you?
It's the same number I'm calling from.
Perfect, got it. Now, can you please provide the service address where the HVAC system is located?
Sure, it's 123 Maple Street.
Thank you for that, Mike. Can you please confirm the city and ZIP code for that address?
It's Springfield, ZIP code 12345.

Great, thanks for confirming that. Just to summarize, I have Mike Henderson, your callback number is the same as this call, and the service address is 123 Maple Street, Springfield, ZIP code 12345. You need help with your HVAC system not cooling properly. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s correct.
Perfect, I have passed all of that through to the team, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with today?
No, that’s all for now. Thank you!
You're welcome, Mike! Have a great day! [END CALL]

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I have an emergency. My AC is not working, and it’s really hot.
I completely understand, let me get you sorted right away. Is your system completely not working at all right now?
Yes, it's completely off. No air is coming out at all.
Are you noticing anything like a burning smell, gas smell, or water leaking?
No burning or gas smell, but there’s some water pooling near the unit.
Thank you for that information. I need to collect your name and callback number to assist you further. What is your full name?
My name is Alex Johnson.
Great, thanks for that, Alex. What is the best callback number for you?
The best number is 555-123-4567.
Perfect, got it. That's 555-123-4567. Now, can you please provide the service address?
Sure, it's 123 Maple Street, Apartment 4B.
Thank you, Alex. Just to confirm, that's 123 Maple Street, Apartment 4B. Can you also provide the city and ZIP code?
Yes, it's Springfield, ZIP code 62704.

Great, thanks for that. Just to confirm, I have Alex Johnson, callback number 555-123-4567, service address 123 Maple Street, Apartment 4B, Springfield, ZIP code 62704, and you need assistance with your AC. Does all of that sound right?
Yes, that’s all correct. Thank you.
Perfect, I have passed all of that through to the team, and someone will be in touch with you shortly. Please stay safe, and we’ll get this resolved as soon as possible. Have a great day! [END CALL]

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?
Hi Sophie, I need help with my AC units. Two of them are down at my commercial property.
I appreciate you reaching out, but unfortunately, we don't service commercial properties. I'd recommend contacting a specialist for that. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Actually, I’m a premium client. I thought you would service commercial properties. Can you check that for me?

Sure, my name is [Your Name], and the property address is [Property Address].
I need your full name, please. Could you provide that for me?
It's [Your Full Name].
Great, thanks for that! And what is the best callback number for you?
You can reach me at [Your Phone Number].
Perfect, got it. That's [Your Phone Number], correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Thank you! Now, could you please provide the service address for the property?
The service address is [Service Address].
Just to confirm, you said the service address is [Service Address]. Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct.
Great! Is there anything else I should pass on to the team?

transcript.text: Thank you for calling, this is Sophie. How can I help you today?

Yes, I was wondering if you have a referral program. Can I refer a friend for a discount?
That's a great question. I want to make sure you get the right answer, can I grab your details so someone from our team can call you back?
Sure! My name is Alex, and my phone number is 555-1234.

Of course! My service address is 123 Maple Street.

Yes, that's correct! Thank you.

You're very welcome! Have a great day, take care! [END CALL]
